examples: The grand piano has been replaced with a small, inelegant electric model.
Screen scraping is often considered an inelegant solution, and for good reasons.
Those inelegant cables plugged into your phone line are largely a thing of the past.
Leadership also includes finding all the ways, however inelegant, of moving toward the goal.
The ISS is due to be de-orbited, in the inelegant jargon of the field, in 2020.
